title: Keep the External Orchestrator contract stable
description: The versioned public process contract is the only supported automation boundary and remains provider-neutral for Hermes, other orchestrators, and optional agent skills.
target: 100% of public Ledger operations expose deterministic provider-neutral schemas, structured expected errors, documented exits, idempotency semantics, and compatibility metadata; zero schemas contain mailbox, MIME, messaging, recipient, schedule, delivery, or provider-specific fields; 100% of incompatible-version tests fail before mutation.
load_condition: Every public operation across compatible and incompatible contract versions, exercised by a schema-driven external-orchestrator client and any bundled optional agent skills.
measurement: Generated contract inventory plus automated schema snapshots, forbidden-field scans, error and exit tests, stream-separation tests, replay tests, and compatibility tests.
rationale: Hermes and other callers must rely on typed public contracts rather than prose, provider assumptions, private storage, or implementation APIs. Supports G5 and G7.
